name: python3-slugify
title: python3-slugify
summary: Python module that generates clean, URL-safe slugs
description:
Python module that generates clean, URL-safe slugs
Python3-slugify is a Python 3 library that generates clean, URL-safe slugs from
Unicode strings. It is designed to be simple and flexible, providing a
best-effort approach to slug generation while offering extensive customisation.
python3-slugify provides the core Python 3 library for generating clean,
URL-safe slugs from Unicode strings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-slugify because Python module that generates clean, URL-safe slugs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-slugify as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-slugify with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-slugify --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
